overview.description: The Columbia Short Duration Bond ETF (SBND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks an index comprised of six sub-indices from different segments within the fixed income space. The six sub-indices each have fixed weights within the fund. SBND was launched on Sep 21, 2021 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
infoTable: Bloomberg Beta Advantage Short Term Bond
